# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    n = int(data[0])
    unique_sticks = set()
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        s = data[i]
        normalized = min(s, s[::-1])
        unique_sticks.add(normalized)
    print(len(unique_sticks))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
